diagrams.title: HCAI Design Framework
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between human needs, HCAI principles, and AI system design
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how human needs translate into design principles and system requirements

diagrams.title: Traditional AI vs Human-Centered AI
diagrams.description: Comparison of focus areas between traditional and HCAI approaches
elements: Traditional AI: Technical metrics (accuracy, speed, efficiency)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the paradigm shift from machine-centric to human-centered AI design

diagrams.title: Human in the Loop Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how humans interact with AI systems at different stages
elements: Input Stage: Human provides input and defines goals
Processing Stage: AI processes, human monitors
Output Stage: Human validates and acts on output
Feedback Loop: Human provides feedback for improvement
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the various points of human involvement in AI-assisted decision-making
